secrets.description: PostgreSQL connection string for Guardian's database. Format: postgresql://user:password@host:port/database. Required for persistent storage of users, messages, and channels.
Guardian app's ED25519 public key address (ut1...) for blockchain transactions. Used for transaction signing and app identification on Usernode testnet.
Guardian app's ED25519 private key seed for cryptographic signing of transaction memos on Usernode blockchain. 64 hex characters. Encrypted at rest.
Usernode blockchain RPC endpoint for transaction submission. Platform provides in-network default; override for custom endpoints.

Operating mode for blockchain transactions: demo (simulated with instant confirmation), devnet (database-only, no blockchain), or real_testnet (true blockchain with RPC/explorer polling). Defaults to devnet. Can be set via Secrets or toggled at runtime in Settings (changes persist across restarts).
Block explorer base URL for polling transaction confirmation status. Defaults to Usernode's testnet explorer. Override for custom testnet deployments or alternate explorer endpoints.
